name: simbroker-demo-paper-broker
description: A pretend broker for the PolyBridge Market Foresight cookbook. Records simulated fills to a local file. No real trading, no market connection, no financial advice.

tools.name: create_account
tools.description: Create a local simulated paper account.

tools.name: get_account
tools.description: Show simulated cash and cost-basis positions for an account.

tools.name: preview_order
tools.description: Preview a simulated notional paper order before placement.

tools.name: place_simulated_order
tools.description: Record a simulated fill only after a fresh preview and explicit user approval.

tools.name: get_portfolio
tools.description: Show simulated fills and cost-basis positions.

tools.name: reset_account
tools.description: Archive and reset a local simulated paper account.
